case_title: DARI, SUSAN et al vs. MENA, BRENDA et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT MENA, BRENDA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENA, BRENDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 144 CLINTON PARK STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-26-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, ALL PAST DUE RENTS & DAMAGES WAIVED IF VAC BY 5/26/98; NO FURTHER S/E; PERS PROP LEFT WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED; LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN COND; STIP ACTS AS GEN REL OF ALL CLAIMS FROM THIS TENANCY; EBOC & ATNY FEES; $350 SEC DEP TO BE RETN'D NLT 6/2/98 IF BROOM CLEAN W/ NORMAL WEAR & TEAR.
